verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We bow our hearts, we bend our knees Oh Spirit come make us humble We turn our eyes from evil things Oh Lord we cast down our idols

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So give us clean hands and give us pure hearts Let us not lift our souls to another Oh give us clean hands and give us pure hearts Let us not lift our souls to another

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh God let this be a generation that seeks Who seeks Your face, oh God of Jacob Oh God let us be a generation that seeks Who seeks Your face, oh God of Jacob
